title: Ahtna Ranks 16 on Alaska Business Magazine’s Top 49
summary: Ahtna, Inc. ranks #16 on the List of Top 49 Alaska Businesses of 2022. The Top 49ers are Alaska’s Top 49 local businesses ranked by gross revenue published annually by Alaska Business magazine since 1985. You can read more about this year’s Top 49ers in the October issue of Alaska Business . Alaska...

title: 2022 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: The 2022 Koniag Annual Meeting of Shareholders was held on October 1, 2022 in Tukwila, WA. Incumbent Directors Sven Haakanson, Jr., Christine Kaineg, and Marty Shuravloff were reelected to serve another 3 year term expiring in 2025. Quyanaasinaq to Stephen Parsons for being willing to run and serve!...
